Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Iron Legion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Iron Legion is a swarm of abominations consisting of machines forcibly fused with living beings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Iron Legion had a ritual room in the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — A ritual was intended to raise a new King of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Iron Legion found the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — The Iron Legion operates ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Iron Legion can enter the system from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Iron Legion contains Pawns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Iron Legion uses hunter-ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Iron Legion sent a large ship out of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Iron Legion's ship is a battleship approximately a thousand yards long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Iron Legion uses Penetrators as short-range boarding devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Iron Legion is currently leaderless due to the destruction of their King a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Iron Legion produces specific types of technology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Iron Legion is approaching the Captain's sleeping body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Iron Legion is attacking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Iron Legion is an enemy force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Iron Legion possesses battleships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Iron Legion creates battleships that are half-metal and half-flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Iron Legion creates abominations known as Reavers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Fallen Sword has a personal crusade against the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron Legion does not play by fair rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Iron Legion possesses Hives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Iron Legion is a group that Varic Vallenar intends to wipe out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Sola mentions the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the crew aims to destroy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Iron Legion belongs in Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Iron Legion is a group that can be led by a King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 26''' — The Iron Legion is a group that Sola works to dismantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron Legion is controlled by Bishops.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron Legion acts without a leader by mindlessly devouring and replicating to propagate their existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron Legion received the Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Iron Legion is a group associated with the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Iron Legion has ships surrounding The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Iron Legion is capable of moving a huge fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Iron Legion's universal drive is to make everything part of the Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Iron Legion creatures can be found inside colonies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Behemoth is a trump card of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Iron Legion moves with a unity suggesting the guidance of a King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — The Iron Legion is an endless force with an unlimited commander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — The Iron Legion has fleets that can be dismantled or annihilated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Iron Legion has caused significant damage to The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the characters wish to avoid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Iron Legion has a King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Iron Legion is a military force capable of attacking almost anywhere with Hives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Iron Legion has been pushing into Galactic Union territory aggressively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Iron Legion is a group that destroys copies of Vallenar's father and invades the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the protagonist has seen conquer enough planets to be impossible to dislodge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron Legion is the target of invading viruses seeking its heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Iron Legion is a group that may take over Jak's planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Iron Legion is an entity that Omega mentions in his recitation of the ultimatum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Iron Legion is a group that uses Hives and Hunter-ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Iron Legion uses drop-pods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the characters are engaged in a crusade against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Iron King maintains a link to the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Captain requested the destruction of the Iron Legion.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Iron Legion's Grand Hive was recently destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Iron Legion was one of the groups Starhammer fought during his conquest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Iron Legion is a priority concern for the High Council of the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — The Iron Legion has made Contrasaurs into a Behemoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the narrator requested to be destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — The Iron Legion uses Bishops who can deploy spells, viruses, mental pulses, high-frequency vibrations, acid mists, or parasites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Sola was brought on to handle the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — The Iron Legion cut through Jak's system fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — The Iron Legion has a Hive that looks like a moon at night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — The Iron Legion can deploy a hundred thousand Pawns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Iron Legion is a group that could outnumber the narrator's forces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Iron Legion has fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Iron Legion is a group that Varic's crew fought against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Iron Legion's full force faced down The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Iron Legion is mentioned in comparison to the magical defenses being used.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — The Iron Legion is a group responsible for an ambush that cost Kyri Prest her arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — The Iron Legion is in conflict with the Karoshans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — The Iron Legion is a group that Neth’terith's swarm could become a threat comparable to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The narrator fought against the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Iron Legion was cleared from the Lesser Karoshan system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — There was a hunt on for the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Iron Legion spreads like a virus and does not care about witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Iron Legion is described as having straightforward villains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Iron Legion was summoned by Starhammer to create an Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Iron Legion spans across the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Raion's crew fought the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Iron Legion is a group that the D’Niss use different tactics against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Iron Legion makes new weapons.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Speculation suggests The Last Horizon may be conquering planets in service to the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Zenith Processor does not approve of the Iron Legion's goals or methods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — The Captain's father was taken by the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The piece of flesh found in the station uses Iron Legion technology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — The Vallenar ship carried a shipment of Iron Legion pieces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Iron Legion has experimental subjects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — The Iron Legion is an entity that the characters have potentially dangerous insights on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — The Union has been fighting the Iron Legion for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The landmass of the planet Fathom resembles a victim of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Solstice may intend to create an Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Fallen Sword is dedicated to killing the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Galactic Union ships in the system resemble the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Sola has performed mercenary missions against the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Sola has contacts who help track Iron Legion movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — The Iron Legion is ready to serve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron Legion is engaged in ongoing conflicts with the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron Legion creates things made of twisted iron and steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Several planets along the Iron Legion report withdrawals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Sola wants to stop the Iron Legion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
